zh.Oranmore, Galway, Ireland: 愛爾蘭庫迪 高威奧拉莫
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht於1052年出生在愛爾蘭康瑙特時，他的父親Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught43歲，母親Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain31歲。他於大約1087年與Princess Mor O’Briain在愛爾蘭康瑙特結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1118年在他的家鄉享年66歲。

zh-hans.Oranmore, Galway, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 高威奧拉莫
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht于1052年出生在爱尔兰康瑙特时，他的父亲Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught43岁，母亲Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain31岁。他于大约1087年与Princess Mor O’Briain在爱尔兰康瑙特结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1118年在他的家乡享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Arsenio, Francisco, Jose, Julio, Luis, Luiz, Acacio, Alfredo, Ana, Arnaldo, Geraldo.  Portuguese Joao, Messias.  Korean Kyung, Chen, Cheng Hua, Heang, Heng, Ho Jin, Hyang, Jaehoon, Jianjun, Myung, Sang Soon.

Korean: there are three Chinese characters associated with this surname. Two of these are very rare and are not treated here. The remaining Sa surname is also quite unusual. There are two distinct clans, one of Kyŏngsang South Province's Kŏch’ang County and the other originating with a refugee from Ming China who came to Korea near the end of the Koryŏ period (  AD  918–1392).

variants.name: Saa
meanings: Portuguese and Galician (also Saá): habitational name from any of numerous places called Saa, mainly in northern Portugal and Galicia, of Visigothic origin from sala ‘mansion’.

nameMeanings.name: Ruaidrí
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Rory
meanings: Anglicized form of the Gaelic name found in Ireland as Ruaidhrí and in Scotland as Ruairidh (see respective appendices). In Scotland this is further Anglicized to Roderick . In recent times, Rory has come into popular general use.

nameMeanings.name: na
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: ‘Honest’; also short for any name beginning with Nao-.

nameMeanings.name: Saide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a pet form of   Sarah  , but now generally considered to be an independent name. The exact formation is not clear: probably a nursery form.

nameMeanings.name: Buide
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Gerhard, Hans, Kurt.
North German: status name for a farmer from Middle Low German bunde, bunne, related to Danish, Swedish bonde ‘free peasant’ (see Bond ).

German (Bünde): topographic name from Old High German biunda ‘enclosed fertile pasture’ (modern German Bünde, Beunte), a derivative of biwenden ‘to bend or weave’, with reference to the practice of making fences from woven branches. There are many different local forms and communal implications concerning the use of the land.

variants.name: Bunge
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Dietrich, Ewald, Harro, Lothar, Otto, Reinhard, Siegfried.
German: from Middle High German, Middle Low German bunge ‘drum’, hence probably a metonymic occupational name for a drummer or drum maker.
German (Bünge): in Hesse, a variant of Bünde (see Bunde 2).

variants.name: Bunner
meanings: Irish: Benn, a mountain, and "er," a contraction for fear, a man, meaning a mountaineer

variants.name: Bond
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, originally denoting a medieval farmer who was a smallholder or peasant farmer. The word (Middle English bonde) is of Germanic origin and seems to have referred to a tenant farmer ‘bound’ to an overlord and owing him rent or service.

en.lifeSummary: When Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht was born in 1052, in Connaught, Ireland, his father, Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught, was 43 and his mother, Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, was 31. He married Princess Mor O’Briain about 1087, in Connaught, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1118, in his hometown, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht est né en 1052, à Connaught, Irlande, son père, Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Princess Mor O’Briain environ 1087, à Connaught, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1118, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht 1052 in Connaught, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught 43 und seine Mutter Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain 31. Er hat um 1087 in Connaught, Irland Princess Mor O’Briain geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1118 im Alter von 66 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht è nato il nel 1052 nel Connaught, Irlanda, il suo padre, Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught, aveva 43 anni e il suo madre, Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Princess Mor O’Briain circa 1087, nel Connaught, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1118, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.Galway Castle, Connaught, Ireland: アイルランドコナウト
ja.Oranmore, Galway, Ireland: アイルランドコウントイ ガルワイオランモー

ja.Connaught, Ireland: アイルランドコナウト
ja.lifeSummary: Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connachtが1052年にアイルランドコナウトで生まれた時，父Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaughtは43歳，母Cailleach Caimgein OFallamainは31歳であった。約1087年にアイルランドコナウトでPrincess Mor O’Briainと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1118年に故郷で66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht(이)가 1052년 아일랜드 콘오그h트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught(은)는 43세였고, 그의 어머니 Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain(은)는 31세였다. 그는 대략 1087년 아일랜드 콘오그h트에서 Princess Mor O’Briain(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1118년 그의 고향에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht nasceu em 1052, em Connaught, Irlanda, seu pai, Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Princess Mor O’Briain aproximadamente 1087, em Connaught, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1118, em sua cidade natal, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht родился в 1052 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Princess Mor O’Briain около 1087 г. в местности коннот, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1118 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ruaidrí na Saide Buide Ua Conchobair, King of Connacht nació en 1052, en Connaught, Irlanda, su papá, Áed in Gaí Bernaig Ó Conchobair King of Connaught, tenía 43 años y su mamá, Cailleach Caimgein OFallamain, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Princess Mor O’Briain aproximadamente 1087, en Connaught, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1118, en su pueblo, a la edad de 66 años.
